text: In the first image, I feel a dampened excitement, mingled with self-consciousness. I sense the energy of a focused crowd gathered for a talk or performance, yet as I hang near the threshold, I am both part of and apart from the gathering, suspended in observation. The architecture and glowing screen within seem to beckon, but the separation suggests hesitancy—am I a true participant or merely an onlooker? This liminality draws me into reflection about belonging and presence.
